description: A chaotic interior scene of a Dutch tavern or inn crowded with people drinking, dancing, and making merry. The vaulted interior has a balcony or loft above. In the foreground, figures drink from tankards, children run about, and a musician plays. Tables are laden with food and drink. The atmosphere is raucous and disorderly, with warm earth tones and dramatic lighting from large windows at the right. Numerous figures fill every corner of the composition in various states of celebration and inebriation.
